payload.answer: I concluded that Brain is the source-of-truth system for personal memory, while Cognee provides a rebuildable projection layer that can be regenerated from Brain's data.

entity_resolution.reason: Entities Brain and Cognee are unambiguous in context and require no resolution.

details: Recall synthesized from source-of-truth and projection layers.
